LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmPsychic.label: 8x50mm Psychic
LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmPsychic.description: High power charged shot ammo used by psychically enhanced advanced battle rifles, machineguns and sniper rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmPsychic_Focus.label: 8x50mm Psychic (Focus)
LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmPsychic_Focus.description: High power charged shot ammo used by psychically enhanced advanced battle rifles, machineguns and sniper rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmPsychic_Neuro.label: 8x50mm Psychic (Neuro)
LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmPsychic_Neuro.description: High power charged shot ammo used by psychically enhanced advanced battle rifles, machineguns and sniper rifles.
